command: bash -lc "echo HEALTH; curl -sS -m 5 http://172.31.20.218:8000/health -w ECODE:%{http_code}; echo; echo GET_CONF; curl -sS -m 5 http://172.31.20.218:8000/config/threshold -w ECODE:%{http_code}; echo; echo PUT_CONF; curl -sS -m 10 -X PUT http://172.31.20.218:8000/config/threshold -H Content-Type:application/json -d {\"confidence_threshold\":0.45} -w ECODE:%{http_code}; echo"
